response.justification: Bogdan has deep technical expertise, strong open-source contributions, and broad full-stack experience with Linux and modern architectures, but lacks proven leadership in IT consulting, formal project management, and UML modeling — and his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the required C1 level.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with Linux and DLang/Node.js ecosystems
Proven ability to lead technical projects independently and mentor via workshops
Strong full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud-native systems
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of IT consulting experience or client-facing architecture advisory
Lacks documented UML expertise or formal requirements management in enterprise contexts
